page: Microsoft Azure DC2as_v6 is a general-purpose virtual machine belonging to the DCasv6 server family. It is powered by an AMD processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The instance features 2 dedicated virtual CPUs paired with 8.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This server configuration does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via external block storage, though the instance is designated as Premium Storage capable. There are no integrated GPUs, and it does not come with complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated CPU allocation and balanced 1:4 CPU-to-memory ratio position this instance as a stable entry-level option for workloads requiring predictable compute performance without the overhead of larger resource footprints. Suitable workloads include lightweight web serving, small databases, development environments, and basic general-purpose applications that do not require local NVMe storage or hardware acceleration.
description: Microsoft Azure DC2as_v6 is a general-purpose virtual machine from the DCasv6 family, powered by an AMD processor on the x86_64 architecture. Managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance provides 2 dedicated vCPUs and 8.0 GB of system memory, establishing a balanced 1:4 CPU-to-RAM ratio. The server does not include local storage but is Premium Storage capable, requiring external network-attached storage for persistent data. It features no integrated graphics processing units and includes zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses. With its dedicated CPU allocation, the DC2as_v6 offers predictable performance for entry-level workloads. It is qualitatively cost-efficient for resource-constrained environments, making it suitable for lightweight web serving, small database hosting, development environments, and general-purpose utility tasks that do not demand high-performance local disk I/O or GPU acceleration.

tagline: A balanced general-purpose virtual machine featuring dedicated AMD compute cores, premium storage compatibility, and a stable resource profile.
